# HNK Tours & Travels

> Premium cab and tour operator based in Visakhapatnam (Vizag), Andhra Pradesh. Airport transfers, Araku Valley tours, city sightseeing, outstation trips, and corporate travel — available 24/7.

Tagline: Ride Beyond Your Destination. Contact: +91 99123 60321 / +91 73960 24204, hnktourstravels15@gmail.com, based in Simhachalam, Visakhapatnam.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of HNK Tours & Travels with services, fleet, destinations and booking.

## Services

- Airport transfers to/from Visakhapatnam Airport (24/7)
- Araku Valley & Borra Caves day tours
- Vizag city sightseeing (RK Beach, Kailasagiri, Rushikonda, Simhachalam)
- Outstation trips (Hyderabad, Vijayawada, Tirupati, Chennai, Lambasingi, Annavaram)
- Local hourly cab hire
- Corporate and IT-company travel contracts

## Fleet

- Sedan — Swift Dzire / Honda Amaze (4 seats)
- MUV — Toyota Ertiga (6 seats)
- Premium — Toyota Innova Crysta (7 seats)
- Tempo Traveller (12 seats)
- Force Urbania / Mini Bus (17 seats)
